scenarios.title: Unrouted turn produces exactly one fallback Idea
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: facade hook integration (TP-074-12) and open-knowledge no-ground live e2e (TP-074-14) must each observe exactly one artifact write; covered by SCOPE-074-04A (facade) and SCOPE-074-04B (open-knowledge live regression)

scenarios.title: Explicit capture is provenance-distinct
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: explicit and fallback capture runtime paths must remain distinct

scenarios.title: Same-user same-text within dedup window dedupes
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: live e2e-api row must return already-captured acknowledgement

scenarios.title: Same-user same-text outside dedup window does not dedup
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: unit/integration rows must prove outside-window new bucket behavior

scenarios.title: Cross-user dedup is forbidden
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: integration row must use two isolated users and separate artifacts

scenarios.title: Abandoned clarification captures the original prompt
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: integration row must prove original prompt is captured with abandoned flag

scenarios.title: Counter and IntentTrace carry the capture link
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: integration rows must inspect real metric/trace/artifact linkage

scenarios.title: Missing SST keys fail loud
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: unit config validation proves fail-loud behavior

scenarios.title: Capture is inviolable
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: guard and e2e-api rows prove no suppression path exists

scenarios.title: No content interpretation at capture time
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: unit payload row proves no inferred tags/topics/categories are attached

scenarios.title: Acknowledgement shape is identical across transports
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: cross-transport e2e row must cover Telegram, HTTP, WhatsApp, web, and Android renderers
